Hardware Component File

EDC16CP42 - XE5B - (Diag On CAN)

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference EDC16CP42___XE5B___(Diag_On_CAN)_20090313T160120_V.2_20090812T073456.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7E0
Receive ID 7E8
Functional Addr 7A
Functional Name Injection

Frame AC - (Particle filter ) I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 21AC
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
PFlt_lSumInjVlv - Total driven distance with actual injectorPFlt_lSumlifti - Driven distance since last particle filter changePFlt_mSot - Soot mass inside the particle filter since last filter changePFlt_numRgnSuc - Number of successful regenerationsPFlt_ctRgnErr - Regeneration error counterPFlt_lSumChrgBeg - Drived distance at beginning of state ChargingPFlt_tmrRgnAllowOffs - Offset for timer of particulate regeneration allowancePFlt_swtSotEstInit - Activation/deactivation of estimated soot mass initialisationPFlt_mOfsSotSimRaw - Offset of simulated soot massPFlt_mISotEst - Initialisation value for estimated soot mass integratorPFlt_rOilRgnRaw - Oil evaporation ratio for regeneration allowance raw valuePFlt_mSotBal - Balanced soot massPFlt_mSotIni - Initial value of estimated soot massPFlt_ctRgnMed - Regeneration success counter in medium conditionPFlt_stDiagExtEna - Diagnosis inhibition by after-sales toolPFlt_mSotMin - Minimum value reached by estimated soot massPFlt_mSotMax - Maximum value reached by estimated soot massPFlt_mSotSimIni - Initial value of simulated soot massPFlt_mSotSimMin - Minimum value reached by simulated soot massPFlt_mSotSimMax - Maximum value reached by simulated soot massPFlt_ctRgnCold - Regeneration success counter in cold conditionPFlt_ctRgnHot - Regeneration success counter in hot conditionPFlt_mSotSimInc - Accumulated simulated soot massPFlt_ctSpReq - Vehicle speed request counterPFlt_mSotEstOfsCldStrt_mp - Estimated soot mass offset for cold start conditionsMemorised mean value of CSF upstrem pressureFuel wear estimation (HCCtl_tiEEPEstiHCInj)PFlt_mSotRef - CSF - Reference soot mass (corrected) for msot offset computation
Frame AD - (Read Fuel quantity adjustment values) I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 21AD
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
Injector 1 quantity adjustment valuesInjector 2 quantity adjustment valuesInjector 3 quantity adjustment valuesInjector 4 quantity adjustment valuesStatus Write Fuel quantity adjustment valuesStatus IMAInjector 5 quantity adjustment valuesInjector 6 quantity adjustment values
